step_rationale: Platelet-enriched miRNA; elevated in ACS; regulates platelet activation and monocyte functions.
mechanism: miR-223 dysregulation in acute coronary events amplifies platelet activation and leukocyte recruitment, predicting post-MI mortality.

references.title: MiR-223 and MiR-186 Are Associated with Long-Term Mortality after Myocardial Infarction.
A MicroRNA Signature in Acute Coronary Syndrome Patients and Modulation by Colchicine.
references.journal: Journal of cardiovascular pharmacology and therapeutics

references.title: Platelet microRNA for predicting acute myocardial infarction.
